hero.question: Will Houston Astros win the 2026 American League Championship Series?
hero.prob_take: At 12.8%, the crowd has essentially written off Houston's shot at an AL pennant, pricing in maybe one plausible path to October relevance. The Astros have real pitching depth and a loaded roster, but they're in a gauntlet division with Yankees, Orioles, and Red Sox all capable of running through them, so the market's pessimism tracks even if it's slightly overdone.

daily_take.headline: Astros Jump 7.5pts: Market Finally Prices in Offseason Moves
daily_take.deck: Houston's AL pennant odds spiked from 5.3% to 12.8% on $743K volume, signaling the market is catching up to real roster construction. The move screams smart money recognizing a team positioned to contend in a soft AL West. Sharp bettors should check if this pricing holds at 12.8% or if it's still cheap relative to division win probability.
